channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Republican Representative Faces Resignation Calls
item.description: Representative Jen Kiggans (R-Va.) is responding to calls for her resignation following comments made during a radio interview.

item.title: Marty Makary Departs FDA
item.description: FDA Commissioner Marty Makary is leaving his position after a challenging year, amid internal changes and disagreements.

item.title: Trump's gas tax suspension faces challenges
item.description: President Trump supports suspending the federal gas tax, elevating the proposal. However, significant obstacles remain for its implementation.

item.title: Trump's China trip amid AI security concerns
item.description: U.S.-China competition in artificial intelligence raises cybersecurity risks, experts say.
